# Generated by tools/m9_diplomacy.py --write; M9 ancient international organizations.
# Start membership and all future dated activation are separate from these type contracts.

antq_han_tributary_system = {
	has_target = no
	unique = yes
	expel_members_who_are_targets_of_other_members = no
	show_on_diplomatic_map = yes
	has_leader_country = yes
	leader_type = country
	leader_color = define:NMapColors|INTERNATIONAL_ORGANIZATION_LEADER_COLOR
	create_visible_trigger = { always = no }
	invite_visible_trigger = { always = no }
	can_declare_war = { always = yes }
	leader_modifier = {
		monthly_prestige = 0.05
		diplomatic_capacity_modifier = 0.10
	}
	can_join_trigger = { always = no }
	can_leave_trigger = { always = no }
	auto_leave_trigger = { always = no }
	auto_disband_trigger = { always = no }
	on_joined = {
	}
	on_left = {
	}
	variables = {
	}
	only_leader_country_joins_defensive_wars = yes
	join_defensive_wars_auto_call = {
		scope:target ?= { NOT = { is_member_of_international_organization = root } }
	}
}

	can_leave_trigger = { always = no }
	auto_leave_trigger = { always = no }
